products.name: Oversized Portrait Tee
products.desc: Heavyweight oversized cotton tee with a large graphic portrait print across the front. Drop-shoulder, boxy fit.

products.name: Colorblock Pique Polo
products.desc: Classic pique polo in a black, heather grey and white colorblock, with ribbed tipped collar and cuffs. Extremely limited — only 5 pieces exist.

products.name: Canvas Slip-On Sneaker
products.desc: Low-profile canvas slip-on with a clean white outsole. Easy on, easy off, built for everyday wear.

products.name: Croc-Embossed Leather Briefcase
products.desc: Structured croc-embossed leather briefcase with dual front pockets, secure top lock, and a padded top handle.
